escalation.rationale: Active US-Israeli bombing campaign against Iran with Strait of Hormuz blockaded, ongoing strikes across Gulf states, and Trump promising 2-3 more weeks of intensive operations.

ticker_items: Trump vows to hit Iran 'extremely hard' for 2-3 more weeks
Strait of Hormuz remains blocked, 40-nation coalition seeks reopening
Iran threatens 18 US-Israeli corporations with attacks
Russia launches spring offensive with 400 drones against Ukraine
Casualty totals: 2,076 dead in Iran, 24 in Israel, 13 US soldiers

eastern_europe.description: Russia launched approximately 400 drones plus cruise and ballistic missiles in major assault.

middle_east.description: US-Israeli forces struck a century-old medical research center and Iran's tallest bridge near Tehran.
Hezbollah launched drone and rocket attacks on Israeli military positions and settlements.
Iran continued targeting Gulf countries with ballistic missiles and drones despite Trump warnings.
Israeli bombardment near Iranian embassy in Dahieh district of Beirut.

claimed_totals.figure: 2,076 dead in Iran, 24 in Israel, 13 US soldiers, 27 in Gulf states

ukraine.text: Kyiv faces a deficit of missiles as Washington is focused on its war on Iran
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

middle_east.text: Iran rejects U.S. ultimatum as missile strikes and rising oil prices heighten Middle East crisis
middle_east.speaker: Iranian officials
middle_east.title: Government statement

middle_east.text: Washington was close to achieving its objectives
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Seven million Iranians are waiting for you, ready and armed
middle_east.speaker: Iranian official
middle_east.title: Unknown

middle_east.text: All objectives will be completed shortly and asked for patience from the American people
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Fifteen European nations including Ireland condemned Israeli escalation in Lebanon. Growing transatlantic rift with US over Iran war approach. EU members expressing appall at violence escalation against civilians.

Expanding nuclear arsenal after witnessing Iran's vulnerability to US-Israeli attacks. Kim Jong-un citing Iranian case as evidence smaller powers need nuclear deterrence against superpower aggression.
Britain convened virtual summit with 40 countries to explore reopening Strait of Hormuz. UK leading international coalition efforts to resolve shipping crisis in Persian Gulf.
President Macron publicly rebuked Trump over personal remarks about his wife and marriage. France maintaining distance from US-Israeli Iran operations while NATO faces internal tensions.

financial.notes: Oil prices climbing due to Strait of Hormuz blockade affecting 20% of global oil and gas transit.

update_log.text: Trump promises to hit Iran extremely hard for 2-3 more weeks in address to nation
UK hosts 40-nation virtual summit seeking to reopen blocked Strait of Hormuz
Iran continues missile and drone strikes across Persian Gulf despite US warnings
Russia launches major drone offensive against Ukraine with approximately 400 drones
Iran's ex-foreign minister Kharazi gravely wounded in apparent assassination attempt on his home
US-Israeli forces strike century-old medical research center and bridge near Tehran on day 35
Trump strongly considering NATO withdrawal over allies' failure to join Iran war
Iran threatens destructive attacks on US after Trump declares war overwhelming victory
